title: Epic RPG: Class Artifacts
description: Adds RPG Artifact Sets with unique bonuses that grow as you equip more pieces
body:
Epic RPG: Class Artifacts

Epic RPG: Class Artifacts introduces a classic RPG-style bonus system built around thematic equipment sets. Each set grants unique effects, and by equipping multiple pieces of the same class, players unlock progressive bonuses that enhance specific playstyles. Sets scale from level 1 to level 6, with effects automatically applied according to the most powerful Artifact equipped.

There are currently 9 types of Artifact sets, with many more planned for future updates to expand the customization and depth of the system.

Mod Menu Access

The mod menu opens by default with the J key, but you can change this in the keybind configuration.

***

Artifacts

Artifacts are thematic equipment sets that unlock progressive bonuses when multiple pieces of the same set are equipped. Each set is designed to reinforce a specific playstyle, rewarding players who commit to a class identity with increasingly powerful effects. Bonuses scale from level 1 up to level 6, and the system automatically applies the strongest effect based on the highest-level Artifact equipped.

This mechanic encourages strategic build creation, allowing players to experiment with different combinations while maintaining a clear progression path tied to their chosen class.

Currently, there are more than 10 Artifact sets available — and many more will be added soon to expand the experience.

***

Awakening Artifacts

Every Artifact has an Awakening version, a far more powerful form that doubles the strength of its normal counterpart. Awakening Artifacts provide enhanced bonuses and unique effects, making them a cornerstone for advanced builds. However, they are significantly harder to obtain, requiring greater effort and dedication from the player.

This system ensures that progression feels truly rewarding, offering players a long-term goal and a sense of achievement when unlocking these rare and formidable items.

***

Relics

Relics are powerful standalone items designed to complement Artifact sets. Unlike Artifacts, which require multiple pieces to activate set bonuses, Relics provide immediate effects that enhance the player’s attributes, grant extra abilities, or deliver unique passive powers. They add flexibility to builds, allowing players to customize their playstyle beyond the constraints of set bonuses.

By combining Relics with Artifacts, players can create diverse and personalized builds, mixing the strength of set progression with the versatility of individual relic powers. This synergy opens up endless possibilities for strategic gameplay.

***

Artifact Piece Pouch

Crafted with Set Core and Magic Leather. It also has a 100% drop chance from treasure chests — so don’t ignore those maps! Embark on an adventure to collect these valuable set pieces.

***

Set Core

Dropped by Elite entities with an 8% chance. They come in three ranks — be prepared before facing them, as they are dangerous opponents.

***

Magic Leather

Crafted using Fragment of Essence and zombie flesh. A key material for creating advanced Artifact equipment.

***

Fragment of Essence

Found inside loot chests scattered across the world, or obtained by smelting Relics in a blast furnace. Essential for crafting Magic Leather and other advanced items.

***

🌐 Join Our Discord Community

Do you have new ideas, improvements for my mods, or have you found a bug? This is the perfect place to share them!

In our Discord community you can:

💡 Submit proposals and suggestions for improving the mods.

🛠️ Report problems and bugs so we can fix them together.

🎮 Show your creativity: you're free to use my mods in your own modpacks.

📢 Share your modpack on the server and show the community your unique style.

This space is designed for us to grow together, with respect and enthusiasm for creating mods and modpacks. Your contribution is always welcome!
